untranslatable_reason: Signal requires comparing two independent stochastic indicators (presumably on two different securities in a pairs trade). The allowed indicator list contains only stoch_k and stoch_d, which represent a single stochastic pair. There is no mechanism to define, reference, or compare stochastic values from two separate securities. Additionally, the subtraction operator (-) is not in the ALLOWED_OPERATORS list. A proper implementation would require dual-security support and difference calculation operators not available in this schema.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading signal that requires simultaneous analysis of two securities with their respective stochastics. The current backtest engine structure appears to support single-security analysis only. The threshold of 7 cannot be meaningfully applied without the ability to compute and compare differences between two independent stochastic calculations.
